EAM ONLY:                 "value": "\"\u003chtml\u003eTime: \"+toStr({Timestamp})+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"\u003chtml\u003eLineup: \"+split({fullItemPath},\"/\")[1,0]+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"\u003chtml\u003eDevice: \"+{InstanceName}+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"Alarm: \"+{name}+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"Has changed to : \" + toSTR({State})+\"\u003cbr\u003e\""

EAM ONLY:               "activePipeline": "Alarms/Critical Alerts",


EAM ONLY:               "clearPipeline": "Alarms/Critical Alerts",

EAM ONLY:               },

EAM ONLY:                 "value": "[.]B2_Comp_Suction_Press_Hi"


EAM ONLY:               }

IAD2 ONLY:                 "value": "\"\u003chtml\u003eTime: \"+toStr({Timestamp})+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"\u003chtml\u003eLineup: \"+split({fullItemPath},\"/\")[1,0]+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"\u003chtml\u003eDevice: \"+{InstanceName}+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"Alarm: \"+{name}+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"Has changed to : \" + toSTR({State})+\"\u003cbr\u003e\""

IAD2 ONLY:           "alarms": [


IAD2 ONLY:             {


IAD2 ONLY:               "mode": "AboveValue",


IAD2 ONLY:               "ackPipeline": "Alarms/Ack Alerts",


IAD2 ONLY:               "activePipeline": "Alarms/Critical Alerts",


IAD2 ONLY:               "timeOnDelaySeconds": 10.0,


IAD2 ONLY:               "name": "Rtn_Temp_Hi",


IAD2 ONLY:               "clearPipeline": "Alarms/Critical Alerts",


IAD2 ONLY:               "externalNotify": "True",


IAD2 ONLY:               "setpointA": {


IAD2 ONLY:                 "bindType": "Tag",


IAD2 ONLY:                 "value": "[.]RA_Temp_Hi"


IAD2 ONLY:               },


IAD2 ONLY:               "CustomEmailMessage": {


IAD2 ONLY:                 "bindType": "Expression",


IAD2 ONLY:                 "value": "\"\u003chtml\u003eTime: \"+toStr({Timestamp})+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"\u003chtml\u003eLineup: \"+split({fullItemPath},\"/\")[1,0]+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"\u003chtml\u003eDevice: \"+{InstanceName}+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"Alarm: \"+{name}+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"Has changed to : \" + toSTR({State})+\"\u003cbr\u003e\""


IAD2 ONLY:               },


IAD2 ONLY:               "CustomEmailSubject": {


IAD2 ONLY:                 "bindType": "Expression",


IAD2 ONLY:                 "value": "\"Alarm - \"+\r\n{name}+\r\n\" \"+\r\n{state}+\r\n\" on \" +\r\n{InstanceName}"


IAD2 ONLY:               },


IAD2 ONLY:               "label": {


IAD2 ONLY:                 "bindType": "Expression",


IAD2 ONLY:                 "value": "{InstanceName}+\" \"+{name}"


IAD2 ONLY:               },


IAD2 ONLY:               "priority": {


IAD2 ONLY:                 "bindType": "Expression",


IAD2 ONLY:                 "value": "if({[.]Rollup_Rtn_Temp_Hi/Rollup Active}||{[.]../Maintenance/MaintenanceMode},\"Low\",\"Medium\")"


IAD2 ONLY:               },


IAD2 ONLY:               "enabled": {


IAD2 ONLY:                 "bindType": "Expression",


IAD2 ONLY:                 "value": "!({[.]Rollup_Rtn_Temp_Hi/Rollup Changed}||{[.]../Maintenance/MaintenanceMode Changed})\u0026\u0026{[.]RA_Temp_Hi_Enabled}"


IAD2 ONLY:               }


IAD2 ONLY:             },

IAD2 ONLY:               },


IAD2 ONLY:               "CustomEmailMessage": {


IAD2 ONLY:                 "bindType": "Expression",


IAD2 ONLY:                 "value": "\"\u003chtml\u003eTime: \"+toStr({Timestamp})+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"\u003chtml\u003eLineup: \"+split({fullItemPath},\"/\")[1,0]+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"\u003chtml\u003eDevice: \"+{InstanceName}+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"Alarm: \"+{name}+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"Has changed to : \" + toSTR({State})+\"\u003cbr\u003e\""

IAD2 ONLY:                 "bindType": "Expression",


IAD2 ONLY:                 "value": "\"\u003chtml\u003eTime: \"+toStr({Timestamp})+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"\u003chtml\u003eLineup: \"+split({fullItemPath},\"/\")[1,0]+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"\u003chtml\u003eDevice: \"+{InstanceName}+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"Alarm: \"+{name}+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"Has changed to : \" + toSTR({State})+\"\u003cbr\u003e\""

IAD2 ONLY:               "clearPipeline": "Alarms/Critical Alerts",


IAD2 ONLY:               "externalNotify": "True",


IAD2 ONLY:               "CustomEmailMessage": {


IAD2 ONLY:                 "bindType": "Expression",


IAD2 ONLY:                 "value": "\"\u003chtml\u003eTime: \"+toStr({Timestamp})+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"\u003chtml\u003eLineup: \"+split({fullItemPath},\"/\")[1,0]+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"\u003chtml\u003eDevice: \"+{InstanceName}+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"Alarm: \"+{name}+\"\u003cbr\u003e\"+\r\n\"Has changed to : \" + toSTR({State})+\"\u003cbr\u003e\""

IAD2 ONLY:               },

IAD2 ONLY:                 "value": "if({[.]Rollup_Dirty_Filter_Alm/Rollup Active}||{[.]../Maintenance/MaintenanceMode},\"Low\",\"Medium\")"

IAD2 ONLY:               }


IAD2 ONLY:             }

EAM ONLY:               },

EAM ONLY:                 "value": "!({[.]../Data/RollUp_Comm_Fail/Rollup Changed}||{[.]../Maintenance/MaintenanceMode Changed})"


EAM ONLY:               },

EAM ONLY:               "name": "Comm_Fail",

EAM ONLY:               },


EAM ONLY:               "setpointA": 1.0,


EAM ONLY:               "timeOffDelaySeconds": 300.0,

          "name": "Comm_Fail",

IAD2 ONLY:           "script": "\tbase_path \u003d \u0027/\u0027.join(tagPath.split(\u0027/\u0027)[:-1])\n\tsystem.tag.writeBlocking([base_path + \u0027/Parameters.RTU_Num\u0027], [currentValue])"


        }


      ],


IAD2 ONLY:       "expression": "right(TAG({PathToParentFolder}+\"/Parameters.device\"),2)",

EAM ONLY:               "tagType": "AtomicTag",
